Photo Booth Rental in Shelburne NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals offers 360 Video Booth rentals in Shelburne NS. Perfect for birthdays, grad parties, school events, fundraisers, corporate events, and community celebrations. Rent standalone or save with an add-on discount alongside any inflatable or package rental. Setup and takedown included.

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. Travel fee applies after the first 15 km from Bridgewater ($0.72/km). Final travel cost confirmed before booking.

Featured Rentals

  • 360 Video Booth - Video Booth, From $249, Dry-use - 360 Video Booth rental for weddings, graduations, birthdays, school events, community events, corporate events, church events, and fundraisers in Nova Scotia.

Best For

  • Birthdays and family celebrations
  • School events and grad parties
  • Fundraisers and community events
  • Corporate and festival events

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you offer 360 Video Booth rentals in Shelburne?
Yes. Nova Kingdom Rentals offers 360 Video Booth rentals in Shelburne NS. Contact us to confirm availability and travel cost for your event date.
How much does the 360 Video Booth cost?
Standalone: $249 for 1 hour, additional hours $125/hr. Add-on with any inflatable or package: $199 for 1 hour, additional hours $70/hr. Operator included.
What does the photo booth rental include?
Setup and takedown are included. Operator is included. Basic props may be included when available. Custom video editing is not included unless quoted separately.
Is booking confirmed after I submit the form?
No. Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. Nova Kingdom Rentals confirms availability, travel cost, and pricing before your rental is finalized.
